# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 26 — 2025 Estimated Tax Payments and Amount Applied From 2024 Return

> Tax year 2025. Last re-authored 2026-06-14 after Gap F closure (2026-06-10) — spouse-form aggregation now strictly MFJ-gated.

---

## 1. Inputs

### 1a. Personal forms

| Form ID | Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `madeEstimatedTaxPayments` | boolean | Screening gate (Convention 5) — if false on both forms the helper returns `null` immediately |
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `installment1Amount` | decimal | Q1 payment (period Jan 1 – Mar 31; due Apr 15, 2025) |
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `installment2Amount` | decimal | Q2 payment (period Apr 1 – May 31; due Jun 16, 2025 — Jun 15 is Sunday) |
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `installment3Amount` | decimal | Q3 payment (period Jun 1 – Aug 31; due Sep 15, 2025) |
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `installment4Amount` | decimal | Q4 payment (period Sep 1 – Dec 31; due Jan 15, 2026) |
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `priorYearOverpaymentCredited` | decimal | 2024 original-return overpayment elected to be applied to 2025 estimated tax |
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `amendedReturnOverpaymentCredited` | decimal | 2024 Form 1040-X overpayment elected to be applied to 2025 estimated tax |
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `divorceFormerSpouseSSN` | string | Annotation-only — NOT summed; excluded from the field-iteration list at line 27493–27496 |
| `estimated-tax-payments-spouse` | `madeEstimatedTaxPayments` | boolean | Spouse-side screening gate — read **only when `isMfj`** (Gap F closure 2026-06-10) |
| `estimated-tax-payments-spouse` | `installment1Amount` … `amendedReturnOverpaymentCredited` | decimal | Spouse-side 6 numeric payment fields — same semantics as taxpayer form; read on MFJ only |

### 1b. Filing-status derivation

| Source | Field | How used |
|---|---|---|
| `filing-status` | `filingStatus` | Used by `computeLine31ThroughLine38` to set `isMfj` and `isMfs` and pass `isMfj` into `computeLine26EstimatedTax` |

### 1c. NOT used by the helper

| Item | Why not |
|---|---|
| Income, AGI, deductions, tax, or credits | Line 26 is a payments aggregation; it has zero upstream compute dependencies |
| `divorceFormerSpouseSSN` | Annotation-only; excluded from the iterated `fields` list |
| `prior-year-tax-taxpayer.payment{1..4}Amount` | This is a **separate** intake form read only by Form 2210 regular-method (`TaxReturnComputeService.java:27628-27632, 27678`) — NOT by line 26 |

---

## 2. Output

| Field | Class | Type | Null when zero? |
|---|---|---|---|
| `estimatedTaxPayments` | `Payments.java` | `BigDecimal` | Yes — null when the screening gate is false on both forms, or when the resulting positive-only sum is `≤ 0` |

---

## 3. Compute Logic

`computeLine26EstimatedTax` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27468-27525`:

1. Read taxpayer-form gate `madeEstimatedTaxPayments`.
2. Read spouse-form gate `madeEstimatedTaxPayments` **only when `isMfj && spouseForm != null`**.
3. If neither gate is true, return `null` (line 27491).
4. Iterate the 6-field `fields` list (installment 1-4 + priorYearOverpaymentCredited + amendedReturnOverpaymentCredited) and add **positive-only** values from the taxpayer form when the taxpayer gate is true.
5. Iterate the same 6 fields from the spouse form when `isMfj && spouseMade`.
6. Return `roundMoney(total)` when `total > 0`, else `null` (null-when-zero convention).

Wired in `computeLine31ThroughLine38` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27214-27220`:

```java
boolean isMfs = "Married filing separately".equalsIgnoreCase(filingStatusStr);
boolean isMfj = "Married filing jointly".equalsIgnoreCase(filingStatusStr);
// Gap F closure (2026-06-10) — pass isMfj so the helper only aggregates the spouse form on MFJ.
BigDecimal line26 = computeLine26EstimatedTax(estimatedTaxPaymentsTaxpayer, estimatedTaxPaymentsSpouse, isMfj);
payments.setEstimatedTaxPayments(line26);
```

---

## 4. Downstream Consumers

| Consumer | Field read | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `computeLine31ThroughLine38()` line 33 | `payments.getEstimatedTaxPayments()` | `line33 = line25d + line26 + line32` |
| `computeForm2210()` Part I | `payments.getTotalPayments()` (line 33 transitively includes line 26) | Required-annual-payment vs. actual-payments comparison |
| Frontend PDF fill | `payments.estimatedTaxPayments` | `values['line26_estimated_tax_payments'] = formatAmount(...)` |
| Frontend line 33 recompute | `payments.estimatedTaxPayments` | `sumAmounts([line25d, estimatedTaxPayments, line32])` |

> Form 2210 line 11 (estimated-tax payments per period, regular-method) reads a **separate** `prior-year-tax-taxpayer` form. Those `payment1Amount`..`payment4Amount` fields are distinct from line 26's `installment{1..4}Amount` fields by design — see §6 of the line spec.

---

## 5. Compute Order

```
prepare()
  ├─ load "estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer"  → estimatedTaxPaymentsTaxpayer
  ├─ load "estimated-tax-payments-spouse"    → estimatedTaxPaymentsSpouse (only consulted on MFJ)
  └─ load "filing-status"                    → filingStatus

computeLine31ThroughLine38()                 (line 27210+)
  ├─ normalizeFilingStatus()                 → filingStatusStr, isMfs, isMfj
  ├─ computeLine26EstimatedTax(              (line 27468)
  │      taxpayerForm,
  │      spouseForm,
  │      isMfj)                              ← Gap F closure: isMfj (not !isMfs)
  │   ├─ returns null if neither form gate true
  │   ├─ sums 6 positive-only fields from taxpayer when gate true
  │   ├─ sums 6 positive-only fields from spouse when isMfj && spouse gate true
  │   └─ returns roundMoney(total) or null when total ≤ 0
  └─ payments.setEstimatedTaxPayments(line26)

computeForm2210()                            (called after computeLine31ThroughLine38)
  └─ uses payments.totalPayments (which includes line 26) for penalty calculation
```

---

## 6. Filing-Status Behavior

| Filing status | Taxpayer form | Spouse form | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Single / HoH / QSS | Read | **NOT read** (Gap F closure) | Pre-Gap F the helper read the spouse form on `!isMfs`, silently overstating line 26 when stale spouse-form data was left from a prior MFJ selection (single-return architecture stores all personal forms under one household UID). |
| MFJ | Read | Read | Both spouses' 6 fields are aggregated. Either form may be absent — the helper handles per-form null. |
| MFS | Read | **NOT read** | Pub. 505 manual allocation rule is OOS (G8). Helper reads only taxpayer's own form. |

---

## 7. PDF Field Map

| Semantic key | Source | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `line26_estimated_tax_payments` | `form.payments?.estimatedTaxPayments` | Form 1040 page 2 — formatted via standard amount formatter; blank when null |
| (annotation) Former spouse SSN box | `divorceFormerSpouseSSN` (taxpayer form) | Stored but not summed; rendered as text annotation on the line 26 row |

---

## 8. Validations / Flags

- Negative entries: per-addend positive-only filter at lines 27503 / 27517 — negatives are skipped, not netted against positives.
- Stored output is `null` (not `0`) when the gate is false on both forms or when the positive-only sum is ≤ 0 — null-when-zero PDF rendering convention.
- The `divorceFormerSpouseSSN` field is annotation-only and never iterated as a payment field.

No `TaxReturnFlag` is emitted by `computeLine26EstimatedTax` itself.

---

## 9. Gaps Summary

| ID | Severity | Description | Status | Date |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| F | MEDIUM | Spouse-form aggregation guard was `!isMfs` and incorrectly summed spouse-form payments on Single / HoH / QSS when stale spouse-form data was left from a prior MFJ filing-status selection | **Fixed** | 2026-06-10 — guard narrowed to `isMfj`; helper signature changed from `(taxpayerForm, spouseForm, isMfs)` to `(taxpayerForm, spouseForm, isMfj)` |
| G1 | LOW | Earlier docs referenced spouse form as "never read" — stale before Gap F | **Superseded by Gap F** | 2026-05-15 / 2026-06-10 |
| G8 | LOW | MFS Pub. 505 manual allocation rule (spouses cannot agree → allocate in proportion to separate-return tax) | Deferred OOS | — |
| — | LOW | Payment dates for Form 2210 Schedule AI (per-period payment timing) | Deferred OOS | — |
| — | LOW | Form 1040-ES quarterly voucher PDF export | Deferred OOS | — |
| — | LOW | Farmers/fishermen 66⅔% safe harbor (Form 2210-F) | OOS | — |
| — | LOW | Community-property MFS 50/50 split | OOS | — |

---

## 10. YAML Intake Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `C:\us-tax\yamls\26-estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer.yaml` | Taxpayer 6 fields + gate + `divorceFormerSpouseSSN` annotation |
| `C:\us-tax\yamls\26-estimated-tax-payments-spouse.yaml` | Spouse 6 fields + gate (MFJ-only effective) |

---

## 11. Forms Checklist

| Form | Count per return | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|
| Form 1040 | 1 | line 26 lives here |
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | 0 or 1 | source of taxpayer-side 6 fields + gate |
| `estimated-tax-payments-spouse` | 0 or 1 | source of spouse-side 6 fields + gate (MFJ only) |
| Form 1040-ES | 0 or more | voucher receipts flow into installment fields |
| Form 1040-X (2024) | 0 or 1 | feeds `amendedReturnOverpaymentCredited` |
| Form 2210 | 0 or 1 | reads `payments.totalPayments` transitively; reads `prior-year-tax-taxpayer` form for Schedule AI / regular-method |
